item.description:
🚀 Much Faster Startup

  • Glow now launches up to 3× faster. You'll see your customized menu bar almost instantly after opening the app or logging in.

🖱️ Lower CPU Usage

  • If you use a gaming or high-polling-rate mouse, you'll notice less battery drain and lower CPU usage. Glow now only tracks your cursor when it's near the menu bar.

✋ Dragging Icons Works Much Better

Reorganizing your menu bar icons with Cmd + drag is now far more reliable:

  • Works correctly with icons that live behind the notch or off the visible screen area.
  • Apps that used to "get stuck" while dragging (Discord, Bento Box, browsers, etc.) now respond much better.
  • If an app quits right as you try to move its icon, Glow detects it instantly instead of hanging.
  • Drags on external displays no longer interfere with the main display.

🛡️ Fewer Quirks

  • Hover no longer gets "stuck": if hovering over the bar sometimes failed to expand it, that's fixed.
  • Invisible cursor: in the rare case the cursor disappeared while reorganizing icons, Glow now restores it automatically.
  • Cursor tracking recovery: if macOS paused cursor detection due to a system timeout, Glow now re-enables it on its own — no restart needed.
  • Switching apps mid-drag no longer breaks icon positions.

✨ Layout Improvements

  • More accurate calculation of icon edges and positions in the bar.
  • Better detection of the leftmost icon in complex configurations.
  • Smoother, more stable animations and transitions while moving items.
